pr.title: Record: FarnsworthEngine v1 — TTT + 11L Int6 MLP3x, val_bpb=1.1303

output.summary: Stacks test-time SGD adaptation onto an 11-layer Int6 MLP3x with FlashAttention, NTK-RoPE, and Muon/SWA before sliding-window eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Runs full-weight SGD test-time training on the validation shard before sliding-window scoring.
techniques: Test-time SGD adaptation on val data
11-layer Int6 MLP3x with ReLU², FlashAttention, and NTK-RoPE
Muon optimizer with SWA, GQA heads, and stride-64 sliding eval
